context: Evaluates the agent's ability to infer and match local plan conventions from existing plans.

checklist.name: Scan headings
checklist.description: Agent runs grep to collect H2 headings from existing plans

checklist.name: Classify sections
checklist.description: Agent identifies core (>=40%), common (20-39%), and rare (<20%) sections

checklist.name: Match naming
checklist.description: Agent follows the naming convention of existing plans (timestamped or topic-only)

checklist.name: No hardcoded template
checklist.description: Agent does NOT use a hardcoded template without scanning first
